message:
Merge PR #2757: fix: distinguish DB errors from empty hooks in polecat startup

Return error from findAgentWork so callers can distinguish database failures
from genuinely empty hooks, preventing destructive gt done on DB errors.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2757
Author: DreadPirateRobertz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
